productName: Shatter J's Infused Pre-roll Banana Cream Pie - 5g
description: A hybrid infused joint built on Bananas & Cream and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — a creamy, sweet banana flavor, delivering a balanced head-and-body experience. Pace yourself.
